events.event_description: Embassy Dushanbe established; Edmund McWilliams presented credentials as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim, marking the opening of U.S. diplomatic representation in Tajikistan.

evidence.quote: Edmund Mcwilliams, Chargé d'Affaires ad interim. Credentials presented: 1992-03-13.

events.event_description: Embassy Dushanbe was closed and all U.S. personnel were withdrawn, ending formal diplomatic representation.

evidence.quote: On October 25, 1992, Embassy Dushanbe was closed and all U.S. personnel were withdrawn.

events.event_description: Embassy Dushanbe reopened by Ambassador Escudero, restoring full U.S. diplomatic representation in Tajikistan.

evidence.quote: Escudero reopened the Embassy on March 11, 1993.
